photos.title: Close-Up Selfie
photos.caption: A close-up selfie with wired earbuds in.
photos.alt: Close-up selfie of a bald man wearing a black t-shirt and wired earbuds against a plain wall.

photos.title: Family Graduation Celebration
photos.caption: A family celebration for a 2021 high school graduation, complete with "Congrats Grad" balloons.
photos.alt: A family posing together outdoors celebrating a 2021 graduation, with a graduate in cap and gown and balloons reading Congrats Grad.
